{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Fish Head
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=Reward for completing the Four-Headed Fish [[Mailbox]] storyline.
|description=A relic from the Four-Colored Fish civilization’s golden age, when their golden empire spanned the ocean depths.
|fame=16
|art=12
|fth=18
|civ=30
|tech=14
|ss1=Per type of food collected, Snail HP +10 <br> Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss2= Per type of food collected, Snail HP +20 <br> Types of Food Collected: 60/60
|ss3= Per type of food collected, Snail HP +30 <br> Types of Food Collected: 60/60
}}

[[Category:CIV Relics]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Green CIV Relics]]
